title: Revisiting the Origin of the Star-Forming Main Sequence Based on a Volume-Limited Sample of ~25,000 Galaxies
comment: 3 figures. Invited and accepted by Universe
summary: We revisit the extensively debated star-forming main sequence (SFMS)-a tight correlation between the star formation rate and stellar mass in both kiloparsec-resolved and integrated galaxies. We statistically explore the fundamental drivers of star formation at global scales, using a large volume-limited sample of 24,954 local star-forming galaxies to overcome the limitations of previous works. Based on the mid-infrared 12 micron luminosity, stellar mass, and g-r color, we estimate the molecular gas mass for the considered sample. At galaxy-wide scales, we establish global relations between the surface densities of the star formation rate, stellar mass, and molecular gas mass . These global density relations are connected with and follow similar trends as the resolved SFMS, the Kennicutt-Schmidt (KS) relation, and the molecular gas main sequence (MGMS). Taking advantage of this large catalog, we show that the scatters in the global KS and MGMS relations are smaller than that of the global relation between the star formation rate surface density and stellar mass surface density, and their Pearson correlation coefficients are higher. More importantly, multivariate regression and partial correlation analyses demonstrate that the apparent correlation between the star formation rate surface density and stellar mass surface density is entirely mediated by the molecular gas surface density, with its best-fit parameters directly derivable from those of the KS and MGMS relations. Overall, our findings suggest that the correlation between stellar mass and molecular gas, as well as that between molecular gas and star formation, are more direct and fundamental. The star-forming main sequence thus appears to be a natural by-product of these two tighter relations.

AI.tldr: 本文重新审视恒星形成主序关系，通过大样本星系数据分析发现恒星形成率与恒星质量之间的相关性实际上是由分子气体质量介导的，分子气体-恒星质量和分子气体-恒星形成率这两个关系更为直接和基础。
AI.motivation: 重新探讨恒星形成主序关系的基本驱动因素，克服先前研究的局限性，通过大样本数据统计性地探索星系尺度上恒星形成的根本机制。
AI.method: 使用24,954个本地恒星形成星系的大样本，基于中红外12微米光度、恒星质量和g-r颜色估算分子气体质量，建立恒星形成率、恒星质量和分子气体质量的全局密度关系，并进行多元回归和偏相关分析。
AI.result: 全局KS关系和MGMS关系的离散度小于恒星形成率面密度与恒星质量面密度关系的离散度，且Pearson相关系数更高。多元分析表明恒星形成率面密度与恒星质量面密度之间的表观相关性完全由分子气体面密度介导。
AI.conclusion: 恒星质量与分子气体之间的相关性以及分子气体与恒星形成之间的相关性更为直接和基础，恒星形成主序关系是这两个更紧密关系的自然副产品。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们重新审视了广泛讨论的恒星形成主序（SFMS）——即在千秒差距分辨和积分星系中恒星形成率与恒星质量之间的紧密相关性。我们利用一个包含24,954个本地恒星形成星系的大体积限制样本，在全局尺度上统计探索恒星形成的基本驱动因素，以克服先前工作的局限性。基于中红外12微米光度、恒星质量和g-r颜色，我们估算了所考虑样本的分子气体质量。在星系尺度上，我们建立了恒星形成率面密度、恒星质量面密度和分子气体质量面密度之间的全局关系。这些全局密度关系与已解析的SFMS、Kennicutt-Schmidt（KS）关系和分子气体主序（MGMS）相关联并遵循相似的趋势。利用这个大样本，我们表明全局KS和MGMS关系的弥散小于恒星形成率面密度与恒星质量面密度之间全局关系的弥散，并且它们的皮尔逊相关系数更高。更重要的是，多元回归和偏相关分析表明，恒星形成率面密度与恒星质量面密度之间的表观相关性完全由分子气体面密度中介，其最佳拟合参数可直接从KS和MGMS关系的参数推导得出。总体而言，我们的发现表明恒星质量与分子气体之间的相关性以及分子气体与恒星形成之间的相关性更为直接和基础。因此，恒星形成主序似乎是这两个更紧密关系的自然副产品。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有总结：恒星质量与分子气体之间的相关性以及分子气体与恒星形成之间的相关性更为直接和基础，恒星形成主序关系是这两个更紧密关系的自然副产品。

title: Uncovering the absorbed atomic Universe with the [OI]63um line
comment: 20 Pages, accepted for publication in Astronomy & Astrophyics
summary: We report the discovery of strongly absorbed [OI]63um in a sample of 12 DSFGs at 4.2<z<5.8 selected from the SPT survey. This is the first systematic survey of the [OI]63um fine-structure line at z>4. Using ALMA Bands 9 and 10, we obtain spatially and spectrally resolved observations that probe the interstellar medium on sub-kpc scales. Despite reaching sensitivities 10-100x deeper than most previous studies, we detect [OI]63um in emission in only 2 sources at low significance, with the remaining galaxies yielding stringent non-detections over the full velocity range covered by robust detections of other far-infrared lines, including [CII] and [NII]205um. We identify several compact (0.05-0.2") regions having [OI]63um absorption against the far-infrared dust continuum, some of which are possibly reaching below rest-frame CMB radiation level. We also detect narrow, spatially localised [OI]63um emission "escape channels" preferentially detected in regions with weak or absent dust continuum emission. We predict that similar absorption effects may appear in the [CII] line, particularly when concentrating on the regions with the densest foreground material along the line of sight. The [OI]63um line appears to be originate from a mix of compact, high optical depth [OI]63um emitting regions and sub-thermally excited, oxygen-rich molecular clouds dispersed throughout high-redshift starbursts that are capable of absorbing the ground-state line emission. Combined with a comparison to cosmological radiation hydrodynamical simulations, this supports the interpretation that regions with higher gas and dust column densities may lead to weakening an intrinsically strong [OI]63um line emission. We argue that the high [OI]63um optical depth is the dominant effect causing the strong absorption, limiting the diagnostic power of this line to trace regions of massive star formation in high-redshift DSFGs.

AI.tldr: 首次系统探测z>4的[OI]63μm精细结构线，在12个高红移尘埃恒星形成星系中发现强吸收特征，仅2个源有微弱发射线检测，多数为严格非检测，揭示高光学深度限制了该线对恒星形成区域的示踪能力。
AI.motivation: 研究高红移(z>4)尘埃恒星形成星系中[OI]63μm精细结构线的性质，了解其在示踪恒星形成活动中的诊断能力，探索高红移星系中星际介质的物理条件。
AI.method: 使用ALMA波段9和10对12个4.2<z<5.8的SPT巡天选源进行空间和光谱分辨观测，获得亚千秒差距尺度的星际介质信息，灵敏度比先前研究高10-100倍。
AI.result: 仅2个源检测到低显著性[OI]63μm发射线，其余为严格非检测；发现多个致密区域存在[OI]63μm对远红外尘埃连续谱的吸收，部分可能低于宇宙微波背景辐射水平；检测到狭窄、空间局域的[OI]63μm发射"逃逸通道"。
AI.conclusion: [OI]63μm线来自致密高光学深度发射区和亚热激发富氧分子云的混合，高气体和尘埃柱密度导致本征强发射线减弱，高光学深度是强吸收的主导因素，限制了该线对高红移尘埃恒星形成星系中恒星形成区域的示踪能力。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们报告了在从SPT巡天中选出的12个红移4.2<z<5.8的DSFG样本中，发现强吸收的[OI]63μm线。这是首次在z>4处对[OI]63μm精细结构线进行系统巡天。利用ALMA的Band 9和10，我们获得了空间和光谱分辨的观测数据，能够在亚千秒差距尺度上探测星际介质。尽管灵敏度比大多数先前研究深10-100倍，我们仅在2个源中以低显著性探测到[OI]63μm发射，其余星系在由其他远红外线（包括[CII]和[NII]205μm）稳健探测覆盖的完整速度范围内，均得到严格的非探测结果。我们识别出几个致密（0.05-0.2"）区域，其中[OI]63μm吸收出现在远红外尘埃连续谱上，有些区域可能低于静止系宇宙微波背景辐射水平。我们还探测到窄的、空间局域的[OI]63μm发射“逃逸通道”，这些通道优先出现在尘埃连续谱发射微弱或缺失的区域。我们预测，类似的吸收效应可能出现在[CII]线中，特别是当关注视线方向上前景物质最密集的区域时。[OI]63μm线似乎来源于致密、高光学深度的[OI]63μm发射区与亚热激发、富氧分子云的混合，这些分子云散布在高红移星暴星系中，能够吸收基态线发射。结合与宇宙学辐射流体动力学模拟的比较，这支持了以下解释：具有更高气体和尘埃柱密度的区域可能导致本征强的[OI]63μm线发射减弱。我们认为，高[OI]63μm光学深度是导致强吸收的主导效应，限制了该线在高红移DSFG中示踪大质量恒星形成区域的诊断能力。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：[OI]63μm线来自致密高光学深度发射区和亚热激发富氧分子云的混合，高气体和尘埃柱密度导致本征强发射线减弱，高光学深度是强吸收的主导因素，限制了该线对高红移尘埃恒星形成星系中恒星形成区域的示踪能力。

title: Galaxy and black hole coevolution in dark matter haloes not captured by cosmological simulations
comment: 71 pages, 6 main figures, 4 tables, and 23 Extended Data and Supplementary figures. Accepted for publication in Nature Astronomy
summary: Star formation in galaxies is governed by internal and environmental processes, yet their relative roles are not well understood. In particular, uncertainties in measurements of active galactic nuclei (AGN) host galaxies, combined with modeling limitations, obfuscate the impact of supermassive black hole feedback across environments and over time. Here we address this with a comprehensive analysis of ~60,000 nearby AGNs (z < 0.15 and new environment and halo-mass measurements for ~500,000 AGN and non-AGN host galaxies. This benchmark enables unified comparisons with three prominent cosmological simulations--SIMBA, TNG, and EAGLE--and reveals major, contrasting shortcomings. Simulations fail to reproduce observed trends linking star formation, quiescence, AGN luminosity, stellar mass, and halo mass. While simulations qualitatively capture that AGNs are more common in low-mass halos than in rich groups or clusters, detailed host demographics diverge strongly from observations. Partial agreement exists in the stellar mass distribution within large-scale structures, yet all simulations overproduce quenched low-mass satellites in massive halos, while misrepresenting quenched fractions of massive central galaxies and those in low-density environments, which are sensitive to feedback implementation. Improved AGN physics and modeling of multi-phase gas cooling and flows are required to capture the observed interplay between black holes, galaxies, and halos.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过分析约6万个附近活动星系核和50万个星系的环境与晕质量数据，对比三大宇宙学模拟(SIMBA、TNG、EAGLE)，发现模拟在再现星系形成、AGN活动与环境关系方面存在显著不足。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 星系中的恒星形成受内部和环境过程共同调控，但它们的相对作用尚不明确。特别是，对活动星系核（AGN）宿主星系的测量不确定性，加上建模的局限性，掩盖了超大质量黑洞反馈在不同环境和时间尺度上的影响。本文通过对约6万个邻近AGN（z < 0.15）以及约50万个AGN和非AGN宿主星系的新环境与暗物质晕质量测量进行综合分析，解决了这一问题。这一基准数据集使得与三个著名的宇宙学模拟——SIMBA、TNG和EAGLE——进行统一比较成为可能，并揭示了它们主要且截然不同的缺陷。这些模拟未能再现观测到的恒星形成、静止状态、AGN光度、恒星质量与暗物质晕质量之间的关联趋势。虽然模拟定性地捕捉到AGN在低质量晕中比在富星系团或星系群中更常见，但详细的宿主星系人口统计特征与观测结果存在显著差异。在大尺度结构内的恒星质量分布方面存在部分一致性，然而所有模拟都在大质量晕中过度产生了淬灭的低质量卫星星系，同时错误地呈现了大质量中央星系和低密度环境中星系的淬灭比例，这些对反馈机制的实现方式非常敏感。需要改进AGN物理模型以及多相气体冷却和流动的建模，才能准确捕捉观测到的黑洞、星系和晕之间的相互作用关系。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论为：需要改进AGN物理模型以及多相气体冷却和流动的建模，才能准确捕捉观测到的黑洞、星系和晕之间的相互作用关系。

title: The turbulence driving mode in NGC7793 and NGC1313
comment: 18 pages, 9 figures, 3 tables, accepted for publication by MNRAS (19/02/26), results presented at Stellar Origins 2025
summary: We present spatially resolved measurements of turbulence driving modes across entire extragalactic discs of NGC7793 and NGC1313, using Atacama Large Millimetre/submillimetre Array (ALMA) CO(J=2-1) observations at 13pc resolution. By applying a kernel-based analysis of density and velocity fluctuations, we map the turbulence driving parameter, b, which characterises the balance between solenoidal ($b\sim0.3$) and compressive ($b\sim1$) turbulent driving regimes. b is quantified as the ratio of the turbulent density fluctuations relative to the turbulent sonic Mach number, M. Both galaxies show predominantly solenoidal driving on average for the regions where we find valid results ($b\geq 0.33(\pm 0.05)^{+0.14}_{-0.10}$ in NGC7793; $b\geq 0.24(\pm 0.03)^{+0.10}_{-0.07}$ in NGC1313), noting that this is without including the influences of magnetic fields, making these measurements lower limits. We find substantial spatial variation of b, including localised regions of strongly compressive driving. NGC1313 exhibits higher turbulent Mach numbers and density dispersions than NGC7793, consistent with the disturbed morphology and recent satellite interaction in NGC1313. The turbulence in both NGC7793 and NGC1313 is supersonic ($3\lesssim M\lesssim 20$), and NGC1313 shows a radially decreasing trend of M with galactocentric radius. Radial trends indicate more solenoidal driving in the galaxy centres, potentially reflecting enhanced shear, and increasingly compressive modes in the outskirts. These results demonstrate that turbulence driving varies systematically with galactic environment and cannot be assumed uniform across discs. Our study applies a previously established method to larger scales and new data, linking local turbulence physics to global star formation regulation in galaxies, providing a new avenue for testing theoretical models with future integral field units and ALMA surveys.

AI.tldr: 利用ALMA观测数据，在13pc分辨率下测量了两个星系NGC7793和NGC1313的湍流驱动模式，发现主要呈现螺线管驱动，但存在显著空间变化，湍流驱动参数随星系环境系统性变化。
AI.motivation: 研究星系尺度上湍流驱动模式的分布特征，理解湍流如何影响星系中的恒星形成过程，将局部湍流物理与全局恒星形成调控联系起来。
AI.method: 使用ALMA的CO(J=2-1)观测数据（13pc分辨率），通过基于核函数的密度和速度波动分析，测量湍流驱动参数b，该参数表征螺线管驱动（b~0.3）和压缩驱动（b~1）之间的平衡。
AI.result: 两个星系在有效结果区域主要呈现螺线管驱动（NGC7793：b≥0.33±0.05；NGC1313：b≥0.24±0.03），但存在显著空间变化，包括局部强压缩驱动区域。NGC1313的湍流马赫数和密度弥散更高，与近期卫星相互作用一致。湍流均为超音速（3≲M≲20），径向趋势显示星系中心更多螺线管驱动（可能反映增强的剪切），外围更多压缩模式。
AI.conclusion: 湍流驱动在星系盘中并非均匀分布，而是随星系环境系统性变化。这项研究将局部湍流物理与全局恒星形成调控联系起来，为未来积分视场单元和ALMA巡天测试理论模型提供了新途径。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们利用阿塔卡马大型毫米波/亚毫米波阵列（ALMA）在13 pc分辨率下的CO(J=2-1)观测数据，展示了NGC7793和NGC1313整个河外星系盘中湍流驱动模式的空间分辨测量。通过应用基于核的密度和速度涨落分析，我们绘制了湍流驱动参数b的分布图，该参数表征了无散（$b\sim0.3$）与压缩（$b\sim1$）湍流驱动机制之间的平衡。b被量化为湍流密度涨落相对于湍流声速马赫数M的比值。在我们获得有效结果的区域中，两个星系平均而言均表现出以无散驱动为主（NGC7793中$b\geq 0.33(\pm 0.05)^{+0.14}_{-0.10}$；NGC1313中$b\geq 0.24(\pm 0.03)^{+0.10}_{-0.07}$），需要注意的是，这并未包含磁场的影响，因此这些测量值为下限。我们发现b存在显著的空间变化，包括局部区域出现强压缩驱动。NGC1313展现出比NGC7793更高的湍流马赫数和密度弥散，这与NGC1313受扰动的形态和近期与卫星星系的相互作用一致。NGC7793和NGC1313中的湍流均为超声速（$3\lesssim M\lesssim 20$），且NGC1313的M随星系中心半径呈径向递减趋势。径向趋势表明星系中心存在更多的无散驱动，可能反映了增强的剪切作用，而星系外围则出现越来越多的压缩模式。这些结果表明，湍流驱动随星系环境系统性变化，不能假定其在星系盘中均匀分布。我们的研究将先前建立的方法应用于更大尺度和新数据，将局部湍流物理与星系中全局恒星形成调控联系起来，为未来利用积分视场单元和ALMA巡天测试理论模型提供了新途径。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论如下：湍流驱动在星系盘中并非均匀分布，而是随星系环境系统性变化。这项研究将局部湍流物理与全局恒星形成调控联系起来，为未来积分视场单元和ALMA巡天测试理论模型提供了新途径。

The white contours in the top panels outline regions in which the turbulence analysis yielded valid results based on several criteria (see Sec. 3.5 ). The dashed contours define regions defined in Finn et al. ( 2024b ) , as annotated: the Centre, Ring and Outer regions in NGC7793, and the North Arm, Bar, South Arm, and Interarm regions in NGC1313. The galaxy centres are marked with a cross. While the turbulence analysis can only be successfully performed in a few local regions (hence the sparseness of the turbulence data), they span across the entire field of view of both galaxies, and show substantial spatial variation.

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Full-field PDFs of \(\sigma_{\rho/\langle\rho\rangle}\) (top), \(\mathcal{M}\) (middle), and \(b\) (bottom) for NGC7793 (left) and NGC1313 (right). The median (50th), and the 16th and 84th percentile values of the PDFs are shown as the dashed and dotted lines surrounding the median, respectively, with the values quoted in the panel legends. These PDFs quantify the averages and the spatial variations of the turbulence parameters within each galaxy, which we find are significant. In particular, the median turbulence driving mode \(b\sim 0.33\) (NGC7793) and \(0.24\) (NGC1313) suggests primarily solenoidal driving of turbulence in both galaxies, however, with some regions reaching into the compressive-driving regime ( \(b>0.4\) ).
figures.caption_zh: 图6：NGC7793（左）和NGC1313（右）的\(\sigma_{\rho/\langle\rho\rangle}\)（顶部）、\(\mathcal{M}\)（中部）和\(b\)（底部）的全场概率密度函数。概率密度函数的中位数（第50百分位）以及第16和第84百分位值分别显示为虚线和中位数周围的点线，数值在图例中给出。这些概率密度函数量化了每个星系内湍流参数的平均值和空间变化，我们发现这些变化是显著的。特别是，中位湍流驱动模式\(b\sim 0.33\)（NGC7793）和\(0.24\)（NGC1313）表明两个星系中的湍流驱动主要为无散驱动，然而，有些区域达到了压缩驱动机制（\(b>0.4\)）。

title: Probing Large-scale Structure and the Multi-Phase IGM at the Cosmic Noon -- Insights from a Joint Survey with Euclid, CSST, JPCam, and JUST
comment: 44 pages, 16 figures, 3 tables, accepted for publication by RAA
summary: We present scientific and technical justifications of a potential coordinated Euclid/CSST/JPCam/JUST survey of the Euclid Deep Field North (EDF-N), aimed at probing the multi-phase circumgalactic and intergalactic medium (CGM/IGM) at the cosmic noon over ~20 deg$^2$. The survey is structured around three connected goals: (1) improving photometric redshift (photo-z) accuracy through the combination of broad- and narrow-band photometry, enabling reliable identification of large-scale structures; (2) probing extended CGM emission with dedicated narrow-band imaging; and (3) mapping foreground IGM via absorption-line spectroscopy of background galaxies. Together, these components establish an integrated observational framework to investigate galactic ecosystems -- linking galaxies to their circumgalactic and intergalactic environments -- at cosmic noon. We show that the J-PAS-like narrow-band system used in JPCam substantially improves photo-z accuracies from only the Euclid/CSST broad-band data, especially for star-forming galaxies at z~1.0-1.4. This enables the identification of galaxy groups and (proto-)clusters directly from photo-z measurements. Stacked JPCam narrow-band imaging should also detect extended [O II]-emitting CGM halos. We then construct mock 3D gas distribution model and realistic galaxy catalog, and further construct mock CSST and JUST background galaxy spectra adding Lyalpha and Mg II absorptions. The reconstructed 3D H I field from CSST Lyalpha forest reliably recovers large-scale structures; however, our simulations indicate that detecting diffuse IGM Mg II absorption with JUST is infeasible, either through spectral stacking or via the two-point correlation function method. We conclude that constraining the metallicity of the diffuse IGM will require significantly deeper and higher-resolution spectroscopy expected from future facilities such as the 39 m E-ELT.

AI.tldr: 提出欧几里得/CSST/JPCam/JUST对EDF-N的协同巡天方案，旨在通过多波段观测研究宇宙正午时期的多相星系际介质，包括改进红移测量、探测CGM发射和IGM吸收
AI.motivation: 研究宇宙正午时期（z~1-2）的星系生态系统，连接星系与其周围环境（CGM/IGM），理解星系形成演化与星际介质的关系
AI.method: 采用多设施协同观测：结合欧几里得/CSST的宽波段与JPCam的窄波段数据提高红移精度；通过窄波段成像探测CGM发射；利用CSST和JUST光谱分析IGM吸收线；构建模拟3D气体分布和星系目录进行可行性验证
AI.result: J-PAS式窄波段系统显著提升红移精度（特别是z~1.0-1.4的恒星形成星系），能识别星系群和原星系团；窄波段叠加可探测扩展的[O II]发射CGM晕；CSST的Lyα森林能可靠恢复大尺度结构；但JUST探测弥散IGM的Mg II吸收不可行
AI.conclusion: 协同巡天能有效研究宇宙正午的星系生态系统，但探测弥散IGM金属丰度需要未来设施（如39米E-ELT）的更深、更高分辨率光谱观测

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个潜在的协调Euclid/CSST/JPCam/JUST巡天（针对Euclid深场北（EDF-N））的科学和技术论证，旨在探测宇宙正午时期约20平方度范围内的多相星系周介质和星系际介质（CGM/IGM）。该巡天围绕三个相互关联的目标构建：（1）通过结合宽波段和窄波段测光提高测光红移（photo-z）精度，从而可靠地识别大尺度结构；（2）通过专门的窄波段成像探测扩展的CGM发射；（3）通过背景星系吸收线光谱测绘前景IGM。这些组成部分共同建立了一个综合观测框架，用于研究宇宙正午时期的星系生态系统——将星系与其星系周和星系际环境联系起来。我们表明，JPCam使用的类似J-PAS的窄波段系统显著提高了仅使用Euclid/CSST宽波段数据时的测光红移精度，特别是对于红移z~1.0-1.4的恒星形成星系。这使得能够直接从测光红移测量中识别星系群和（原）星系团。叠加的JPCam窄波段成像还应能探测到扩展的[O II]发射CGM晕。然后，我们构建了模拟的三维气体分布模型和真实的星系星表，并进一步构建了添加了Lyα和Mg II吸收的模拟CSST和JUST背景星系光谱。从CSST Lyα森林重建的三维H I场可靠地恢复了大尺度结构；然而，我们的模拟表明，通过光谱叠加或两点相关函数方法，用JUST探测弥散IGM的Mg II吸收是不可行的。我们得出结论，约束弥散IGM的金属丰度将需要未来设施（如39米E-ELT）提供的显著更深、更高分辨率的光谱观测。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，协同巡天能有效研究宇宙正午的星系生态系统，但探测弥散IGM金属丰度需要未来设施（如39米E-ELT）的更深、更高分辨率光谱观测。

(a) Radial [O II ] surface brightness profiles (solid curves; left axis) and the corresponding single galaxy S/N (dashed curves; right axis) for galaxies with \({SFR}=1,\,2,\,5,\,10,\,20,\,50,\) and \(100~{M_{\odot}~yr^{-1}}\) . title: AVID: A Near-Major Post-Merger of Late-Type Dwarfs beneath a Regularly Rotating HI Disk (VCC 693)
comment: 19 pages (excluding appendices), 16 figures (excluding appendices), Accepted for publication in Astronomy & Astrophysics
summary: On the periphery of galaxy clusters, moderately high galaxy densities and velocity dispersions favour interactions and mergers that influence galaxy evolution prior to cluster infall. Observational studies of this phase in dwarfs remain rare. We present a high-resolution study of the merger remnant VCC 693 in the outskirts of Virgo cluster, using observations from the Atomic gas in Virgo Interacting Dwarf galaxies (AVID) project. We explore the origin of VCC 693 and the consequences of the merger on its star formation and structure through a joint analysis of VLA and FAST HI emission line observations, together with complementary optical imaging and spectroscopy. We employ hydrodynamical simulations to help interpret the observations. Our analysis favours a near-major merger between two dwarfs with a stellar mass ratio of 3:1-4:1, with one likely gas-poor progenitor (i.e., a damp merger). The optical appearance of VCC 693 is dominated by complex tidal structures throughout the system, whereas the HI gas has settled to a regular rotating disk. Compared with similar-mass dwarfs, the central star formation and gas-phase metallicity are moderately enhanced. The global star formation rate, HI gas content, and HI-to-optical size ratio of VCC 693 are broadly consistent with those of typical dwarfs of similar mass, albeit somewhat lower. Decomposition of the HI rotation curve into baryonic and dark matter indicates a high halo concentration, suggesting post-merger relaxation into a more centrally peaked configuration. Together with two recent studies of AVID post-merger systems, these results support the view that even major dwarf mergers can produce remnants with overall stellar structures indistinguishable from ordinary dwarfs, and that the environmental effects in cluster outskirts can promote damp or mixed mergers, constituting an integral part of galactic pre-processing.

AI.tldr: 对Virgo星系团外围的矮星系合并遗迹VCC 693进行高分辨率研究，发现其为3:1-4:1质量比的近主并合遗迹，其中一个前身星系可能气体贫乏。尽管光学上显示复杂潮汐结构，但HI气体已沉降为规则旋转盘，整体性质与普通矮星系相似。
AI.motivation: 星系团外围的中等星系密度和速度弥散有利于相互作用和并合，影响星系在落入星系团前的演化。目前对矮星系在这一阶段的观测研究仍然很少，需要探索并合对矮星系恒星形成和结构的影响。
AI.method: 使用AVID项目的高分辨率观测数据，结合VLA和FAST的HI发射线观测、光学成像和光谱学数据，并利用流体动力学模拟帮助解释观测结果。通过分解HI旋转曲线为重子和暗物质成分来分析系统结构。
AI.result: VCC 693是3:1-4:1质量比的近主并合遗迹，其中一个前身星系可能气体贫乏。光学上显示复杂潮汐结构，但HI气体已沉降为规则旋转盘。中心恒星形成和气体相金属丰度适度增强，整体恒星形成率、HI气体含量和HI-光学尺寸比与类似质量矮星系基本一致。暗物质晕浓度较高，表明并合后弛豫到更中心峰化的构型。
AI.conclusion: 即使是主要的矮星系并合也能产生与普通矮星系整体结构无法区分的遗迹，星系团外围的环境效应可以促进贫气或混合并合，构成星系预处理的组成部分。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 在星系团外围，中等高的星系密度和速度弥散有利于相互作用和并合，从而在星系落入团前影响其演化。针对矮星系这一阶段的观测研究仍然罕见。我们利用室女座相互作用矮星系原子气体（AVID）项目的观测数据，对室女座星系团外围的并合遗迹VCC 693进行了高分辨率研究。通过联合分析VLA和FAST的HI发射线观测，以及补充的光学成像和光谱数据，我们探讨了VCC 693的起源以及并合对其恒星形成和结构的影响。我们采用流体动力学模拟来帮助解释观测结果。我们的分析支持两个矮星系之间的一次近主并合，恒星质量比为3:1-4:1，其中一个可能为贫气体前身（即干并合）。VCC 693的光学外观以遍布整个系统的复杂潮汐结构为主，而HI气体已沉降为一个规则的旋转盘。与质量相近的矮星系相比，其中心恒星形成和气体金属丰度略有增强。VCC 693的整体恒星形成率、HI气体含量以及HI与光学尺寸比，与典型同质量矮星系大致一致，但略低。将HI旋转曲线分解为重子和暗物质成分，表明其暗晕浓度较高，暗示并合后弛豫为更中心聚集的构型。结合近期两项关于AVID并合后系统的研究，这些结果支持以下观点：即使是主要的矮星系并合也能产生整体恒星结构与普通矮星系无法区分的遗迹，并且星系团外围的环境效应可以促进贫气体或混合并合，构成星系预处理的重要组成部分。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论如下：即使是主要的矮星系并合也能产生与普通矮星系整体结构无法区分的遗迹，星系团外围的环境效应可以促进贫气或混合并合，构成星系预处理的组成部分。

title: Probing the magnetic fields and dust properties in the young embedded star-forming region AFGL 6366S using Near Infrared and Optical linear polarimetry
comment: 23 pages, 11 figures, 9 tables, accepted for publication at ApJ
summary: We present Near-Infrared (NIR) and Optical linear polarimetry towards the partially embedded cluster AFGL 6366S. The polarization ranges from 0.44-10.3 per cent in NIR and 0.16-11.22 per cent in Optical bands. The position angle spans $1^\circ - 179^\circ$ in both NIR and Optical bands. About 22 stars exhibit intrinsic polarization signatures. A polarization hole is evident towards the densest ($\sim 3.4 \times 10^{23} \mathrm{cm}^{-2}$) and warmest ($\sim 28.8 \mathrm{K}$) central cluster region. It is attributable to depolarization induced by Radiative Torque Disruption (RAT-D) of large grains and a modest contribution from magnetic-field tangling. The local magnetic field towards the cluster's central region is significantly misaligned with both the large-scale Galactic field and the long axis of the filament present in the region. The field morphology wraps around two dense molecular clumps of radii 0.34 pc and 0.22 pc and $\mathrm N(\mathrm H_2)$ = $(7.9 \pm 1.1) \times 10^{22}$ cm$^{-2}$ and $(4.3 \pm 0.5) \times 10^{22}$ cm$^{-2}$, respectively. The clumps are embedded in the filamentary structure and represent locally accelerated stages of mass accumulation. Gravitationally driven mass flows, largely perpendicular to the local magnetic field, produce a U-shaped field curvature across the filament axis. The plane-of-sky magnetic field strengths towards the two clumps are $ 447.91 \pm 83.81 μ\mathrm{G}$ and $396.66 \pm 73.64 μ\mathrm{G}$. The corresponding mass-to-flux ratios ($λ\sim 1.34$ and $0.82$) indicate that one clump is magnetically supercritical and the other is subcritical. The Alfven Mach numbers ($\mathcal{M}_A$) $\sim$ 0.395 and 0.393 indicate that both the clumps are in sub-Alfvénic state.

AI.tldr: 对AFGL 6366S部分嵌入星团进行了近红外和光学偏振观测，发现中心区域存在偏振空洞，磁场形态包裹着两个致密分子团块，其中一个超临界，另一个亚临界，两者均处于亚阿尔芬状态。
AI.motivation: 研究AFGL 6366S星团区域的偏振特性和磁场结构，以理解恒星形成过程中磁场、物质流动和引力之间的相互作用。
AI.method: 使用近红外和光学波段对AFGL 6366S星团进行线性偏振测量，分析偏振度、位置角分布，并结合分子团块的物理参数研究磁场形态和强度。
AI.result: 观测到0.44-10.3%（近红外）和0.16-11.22%（光学）的偏振度，中心区域存在偏振空洞；发现22颗恒星具有本征偏振特征；磁场包裹着两个致密分子团块（半径0.34pc和0.22pc）；两个团块的面内磁场强度分别为447.91±83.81μG和396.66±73.64μG，质量-磁通比分别为1.34和0.82。
AI.conclusion: AFGL 6366S星团中心区域的偏振空洞主要由大颗粒的辐射扭矩破坏和磁场纠缠引起；局部磁场与银河系大尺度磁场和区域细丝长轴显著不对齐；引力驱动的物质流动产生U形磁场曲率；一个团块为磁超临界，另一个为亚临界，两者均处于亚阿尔芬状态。

recommendation.reason: 该论文研究的是银河系内一个年轻嵌入星团AFGL 6366S的磁场和尘埃性质，使用近红外和光学偏振测量。用户的核心兴趣是强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学、高红移星系运动学、高红移偏振以及高红移多相气体。虽然论文涉及磁场和偏振，但研究对象是银河系内的低质量恒星形成区，与用户关注的高红移宇宙和强引力透镜研究完全无关。论文作者也不在用户的核心作者列表中。因此，该论文与用户的研究方向匹配度很低。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们展示了朝向部分嵌入星团AFGL 6366S的近红外和光学线性偏振测量结果。近红外波段的偏振度范围为0.44%至10.3%，光学波段为0.16%至11.22%。近红外和光学波段的位置角均分布在$1^\circ$至$179^\circ$之间。约有22颗恒星表现出内禀偏振特征。在密度最高（$\sim 3.4 \times 10^{23} \mathrm{cm}^{-2}$）且温度最高（$\sim 28.8 \mathrm{K}$）的中心星团区域，明显存在一个偏振空洞。这归因于大颗粒的辐射扭矩破坏引起的消偏振以及磁场纠缠的适度贡献。朝向星团中心区域的局部磁场与银河系大尺度磁场以及该区域细丝的长轴均显著不对齐。磁场形态包裹着两个致密分子团块，其半径分别为0.34 pc和0.22 pc，$\mathrm N(\mathrm H_2)$分别为$(7.9 \pm 1.1) \times 10^{22}$ cm$^{-2}$和$(4.3 \pm 0.5) \times 10^{22}$ cm$^{-2}$。这些团块嵌入在细丝结构中，代表了局部加速的质量积累阶段。主要由垂直于局部磁场的引力驱动质量流在细丝轴线上产生U形磁场曲率。朝向这两个团块的天空平面磁场强度分别为$447.91 \pm 83.81 μ\mathrm{G}$和$396.66 \pm 73.64 μ\mathrm{G}$。相应的质量-磁通比（$λ\sim 1.34$和$0.82$）表明一个团块是磁超临界的，另一个是亚临界的。阿尔芬马赫数（$\mathcal{M}_A$）$\sim$ 0.395和0.393表明两个团块均处于亚阿尔芬状态。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，AFGL 6366S星团中心区域的偏振空洞主要由大颗粒的辐射扭矩破坏和磁场纠缠引起；局部磁场与银河系大尺度磁场和区域细丝长轴显著不对齐；引力驱动的物质流动产生U形磁场曲率；一个团块为磁超临界，另一个为亚临界，两者均处于亚阿尔芬状态。

title: Resurgence and Hyperasymptotics in Wave Optics Astronomy
summary:
With the discovery of gravitational waves and fast radio bursts, wave optics has become increasingly relevant in astrophysics. This paper studies the behaviour of random gravitational and plasma lenses, presenting the refractive and diffractive expansions, with higher-order terms that allow error estimates and embody the counterintuitive resurgence phenomenon.
  Specifically, we show that the diffractive expansion converges for a broad class of bounded lens models and provides an efficient description of interference patterns across frequency regimes. Next, building on Picard-Lefschetz techniques, we derive the full refractive expansion to arbitrary order, organising it into a transseries. Near caustics, the standard transseries is supplemented with uniform asymptotics. We study this transseries, with both Borel and hyperasymptotic resummation yielding systematic approximations to lensing integrals at all frequencies. Our results give a framework for modelling wave optics lensing near caustics and beyond the geometric optics approximation and thereby illustrate how tools from resurgence and asymptotic analysis can be applied to practical problems in astrophysics.
  Near caustic singularities, the post-refractive corrections diverge, while the uniform asymptotic expansion becomes accurate. We use the leading uniform approximation to derive the strong wave optics suppression of off-axis caustics, which clarifies their subdominant role.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 随着引力波和快速射电暴的发现，波动光学在天体物理学中变得越来越重要。本文研究了随机引力透镜和等离子体透镜的行为，提出了折射和衍射展开，其中高阶项允许误差估计并体现了反直觉的复苏现象。具体而言，我们证明了衍射展开对于一大类有界透镜模型是收敛的，并提供了跨频率区间干涉图样的有效描述。接下来，基于Picard-Lefschetz技术，我们推导了任意阶的完整折射展开，并将其组织成跨级数。在焦散附近，标准跨级数通过一致渐近展开进行补充。我们研究了这一跨级数，其中Borel和超渐近重求和均能在所有频率下给出透镜积分的系统近似。我们的结果为在焦散附近及超越几何光学近似的波动光学透镜建模提供了框架，从而展示了复苏和渐近分析工具如何应用于天体物理学的实际问题。在焦散奇点附近，折射后修正发散，而一致渐近展开变得精确。我们利用领先的一致近似推导了离轴焦散的强波动光学抑制，这阐明了它们的次主导作用。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，该研究为在焦散附近和超越几何光学近似的波动光学透镜建模提供了框架，展示了复苏理论和渐近分析工具如何应用于天体物理学的实际问题中。

title: Linear Perturbations and Multi-Probe Diagnostics in Dark-Sector Selective $f(R,T_χ)$ Gravity
summary: We develop a dark-sector selective trace-coupled extension of gravity in which the matter--curvature coupling depends exclusively on the trace of the dark-matter energy--momentum tensor, $T_χ$, defined from a canonical dark-matter field $χ$. This construction provides a microphysically specified trace sector, removes the usual matter-Lagrangian ambiguity of $f(R,T)$-type models, and preserves minimal coupling of visible matter by design. We derive the full field equations, the exact dark-sector exchange structure, and the linear scalar-perturbation system in gauge-ready form. In the sub-horizon regime, we derive effective modified-gravity functions governing structure growth and light deflection, and show that the model generically produces correlated, scale- and time-dependent departures from General Relativity in growth and lensing observables. Building on this structure, we formulate a perturbation-focused multi-probe framework based on redshift-space distortions, weak lensing, and CMB lensing, explicitly targeting degeneracy breaking beyond background-expansion tests. The analysis establishes the action-level and perturbation-level foundations of the model and provides a conservative, reproducible framework for translated linear-regime constraints within a dark-sector selective modified-gravity setting.

The solid curve shows the evolving transition locus \(k_{trans}(z)/H_{0}\) , illustrating that the onset of scale-dependent growth departures tracks the effective-mass scale \(k_{trans}(z)\simeq aM_{eff}(z)\) . This figure therefore provides a compact pre-closure diagnostic of where, in the \((k,z)\) plane, the model predicts the strongest QS growth response.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：诊断性准静态增长修正图和过渡尺度。在准静态亚视界范围内，诊断性增长修正 \(\mu_{{proxy}}(k,z)-1\) 的二维图，显示在模式尺度 \(k/H_{0}\) 和红移 \(z\) 上。代理量 \(\mu_{{proxy}}(k,z)\) 由方程(67)中标量场扰动的准静态代数闭合构造，背景定义的系数 \(M_{eff}(a)\) 和 \(\mathcal{B}(a)\) 由方程(68)给出。实线显示了演化的过渡轨迹 \(k_{trans}(z)/H_{0}\) ，说明尺度相关增长偏离的开始追踪了有效质量尺度 \(k_{trans}(z)\simeq aM_{eff}(z)\) 。因此，该图提供了一个紧凑的预闭合诊断，显示在 \((k,z)\) 平面中模型预测最强准静态增长响应的位置。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Transition-sensitivity ridge of the quasi-static (QS) growth diagnostic. Heat map of the logarithmic response measure \(\mathcal{T}_{\mu}(k,z)\equiv\partial\mu_{{proxy}}(k,z)/\partial\ln k\) across the \((k,z)\) plane (horizontal axis: \(\log_{10}(k/H_{0})\) ; vertical axis: redshift \(z\) ), for the same Benchmark C setup adopted in the preceding analysis. The bright ridge delineates the scale band where the reconstructed QS growth response becomes maximally sensitive to mode scale, marking the effective transition between GR-like behavior and the modified-gravity scalar sector in the QS limit. The solid curve overlays the predicted transition locus \(k=k_{{trans}}(z)\) , highlighting that the strongest scale sensitivity tracks the evolving QS transition scale inferred from the effective-mass sector. The color bar reports the computed range of \(\mathcal{T}_{\mu}\) for this benchmark.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：准静态增长诊断的过渡敏感性脊。对数响应度量 \(\mathcal{T}_{\mu}(k,z)\equiv\partial\mu_{{proxy}}(k,z)/\partial\ln k\) 在 \((k,z)\) 平面上的热图（水平轴： \(\log_{10}(k/H_{0})\) ；垂直轴：红移 \(z\) ），采用与前述分析相同的基准C设置。明亮的脊线描绘了重建的准静态增长响应对模式尺度变得最大敏感的尺度带，标志着准静态极限下类广义相对论行为与修正引力标量扇区之间的有效过渡。实线叠加了预测的过渡轨迹 \(k=k_{{trans}}(z)\) ，强调最强的尺度敏感性追踪了从有效质量扇区推断的演化准静态过渡尺度。颜色条报告了该基准下 \(\mathcal{T}_{\mu}\) 的计算范围。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Inter-benchmark discriminating-power map in the QS growth sector. Two-dimensional map of the inter-benchmark spread of the reconstructed QS growth proxy, \(\Delta\mu_{{proxy}}^{{spread}}(k,z)\equiv\max_{b}\mu_{{proxy}}^{(b)}(k,z)-\min_{b}\mu_{{proxy}}^{(b)}(k,z)\) , evaluated over the viable selective-coupling benchmark set \(b\) (four representative points, as in Fig. 2). The color scale shows where the QS growth response differs most strongly across viable benchmarks, providing a direct measure of discriminating power in the \((k,z)\) plane. The thick curve marks the peak-discrimination ridge , i.e. the locus where \(\Delta\mu_{{proxy}}^{{spread}}\) attains its maximum at fixed redshift. Overall, the figure isolates the mode-scale band and redshift range in which growth data are expected to be most sensitive to selective-coupling realizations while remaining consistent with the late-time bound in Eq. ( 91 ).
figures.caption_zh: 图6：准静态增长扇区中的基准间区分能力图。重建的准静态增长代理量的基准间散布 \(\Delta\mu_{{proxy}}^{{spread}}(k,z)\equiv\max_{b}\mu_{{proxy}}^{(b)}(k,z)-\min_{b}\mu_{{proxy}}^{(b)}(k,z)\) 的二维图，在可行的选择性耦合基准集 \(b\) （四个代表性点，如图2所示）上评估。颜色尺度显示了在可行基准之间准静态增长响应差异最大的位置，提供了 \((k,z)\) 平面中区分能力的直接度量。粗曲线标记了峰值区分脊，即 \(\Delta\mu_{{proxy}}^{{spread}}\) 在固定红移下达到最大值的轨迹。总体而言，该图隔离了模式尺度带和红移范围，在此范围内增长数据预计对选择性耦合实现最为敏感，同时与方程(91)中的晚期时间约束保持一致。
